3079860.name: Metal Queen Dungeon Soundtrack
3079860.description: Unleash the power of the official Metal Queen Dungeon soundtrack and relive your most epic battles against relentless hero enemies. This sonic fusion of haunting orchestral doom and searing, face-melting metal riffs delivers an electrifying experience in pristine MP3 and crystal-clear FLAC formats. Prepare for an auditory onslaught that will ignite your metal soul!
